title: Geospatial Conformal Prediction: Towards Trustworthy Uncertainty Quantification for GeoAI
abstract: An introduction to conformal prediction in the geospatial context, covering spatially-aware calibration strategies, location-adaptive prediction intervals, and applications to urban and environmental modeling.
related_paper: GeoConformal Prediction: A Model-Agnostic Framework for Measuring the Uncertainty of Spatial Prediction

title: Seeing What We Don't Know: Uncertainty-aware Visual Analytics for Geospatial Explainability
abstract: A talk on the design and implementation of interactive geospatial visual analytics tools that make uncertainty a first-class citizen — covering SHAP-based geo-uncertainty visualization, bivariate mapping, and human-in-the-loop exploration workflows.
related_paper: GeoXCP: Uncertainty Quantification of Spatial Explanations in Explainable AI
